home.quickActionsHint: Common tasks from the home page so you don't have to dig into settings.

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.subtitle: Switch between light and dark, or pick an accent color.

sync.title: Gist Sync
sync.subtitle: Sync user settings and plugin preferences through an encrypted secret GitHub Gist.
sync.unavailable: Sync is only available inside the desktop app.
sync.clientIdPlaceholder: Paste the OAuth App client ID
sync.clientIdHint: DesKit includes a default OAuth App. Override this only for development or self-hosted builds.
sync.gistIdHint: Optional. Paste an existing DesKit sync Gist ID to reuse it on this device.
sync.conflictBody: Remote settings changed at {{updatedAt}} while this device also has local changes.

status.needsPassphrase: Set a sync password to enable encryption

messages.passphraseRequired: Enter the sync password for this Gist before pulling.
messages.decryptFailed: Could not decrypt this Gist. Enter the original sync password, or choose the Gist created by this device.
messages.authExpired: GitHub login expired. Disconnect and log in again.
messages.githubForbidden: GitHub rejected this sync request. Try again later or confirm the OAuth grant includes gist access.
messages.gistNotFound: This sync Gist was not found. Check the Gist ID or let DesKit create a new sync Gist.
messages.gistNotWritable: This GitHub account cannot update that Gist. Use your own Gist ID or upload to create a new sync Gist.
messages.invalidRemoteData: Remote sync data is not compatible. It may be from an older build or manually edited.

network.proxyFailed: Network proxy connection failed. Check your VPN or system proxy and try again.
network.offline: Network is offline. Connect to the internet and try again.
network.dnsFailed: Could not resolve GitHub. Check DNS, proxy, or network settings.
network.timeout: Connection to GitHub timed out. Try again later or check your proxy.
network.refused: Connection was refused. Check your system proxy or firewall.
network.certificate: HTTPS certificate validation failed. Check proxy certificates or system time.
network.generic: Network request failed. Check GitHub access, VPN, or system proxy and try again.

login.slow_down: GitHub asked us to slow down polling.

feature.title: App Launcher
feature.subtitle: Summon a command palette from anywhere to launch installed apps.
feature.aboutBody: Press the global shortcut to open a search box. Installed apps are indexed automatically.

feature.title: Floating Ball
feature.subtitle: Keep a small launcher control on the desktop and open radial shortcuts around it.
feature.aboutBody: Enable it in Settings to show the desktop ball. Click the ball to open its radial menu, or right-click it to close it.

settings.title: Floating Ball
settings.subtitle: Show a desktop shortcut ball and choose which tools appear in its radial menu.
settings.enableHint: Disabled by default at startup until you turn it on here.
settings.menuFeaturesHint: Choose up to 6 tools or plugin commands. The floating ball itself is not a menu tool.
settings.addFeature: Add a tool or plugin command
settings.emptyOptions: No matching tools or plugin commands.

plugins.title: Plugins
plugins.subtitle: Manage built-in, installed, and development plugins.
plugins.unavailableBody: Plugin management is only available inside the desktop app.
plugins.emptyBody: No built-in, installed, or development plugins are registered yet.

preferences.title: Preferences
preferences.body: Changes are saved to the plugin preference store.

marketplace.title: Marketplace
marketplace.subtitle: Discover and install DesKit plugins.
marketplace.unavailableBody: The marketplace is only available inside the desktop app.
marketplace.loadingHint: Fetching the registry and checking installed plugins.
marketplace.empty: No marketplace plugins match your filters.
marketplace.protectedSource: This plugin is provided by {{source}} and cannot be reinstalled from the marketplace.
marketplace.comingSoonBody: The sidebar entry is ready; Git registry browsing and install flows will land in the marketplace PR.
marketplace.gitIntegrationHint: P0 marketplace installation will use HTTPS registry fetches and package hash verification instead of a local git dependency.

settings.title: Launcher
settings.subtitle: Summon the command palette from anywhere with a global shortcut.
settings.hotkeyHint: You can manually enter Electron shortcut syntax, or click to capture and then press the key combination. Shortcut combinations that are already in use may not be captured; please use unused combinations or enter them manually.
settings.screenshotHotkeyHint: Starts region screenshot capture. The screenshot flow is implemented by the host so it can work before any plugin UI opens.
settings.invalid: Could not register that combination. The previous shortcut is still active.
